title: CBSA Investigates Alleged U.S. Renewable Diesel Dumping
content: The CBSA has launched investigations into alleged dumping and subsidization of U.S. renewable diesel, following a complaint from Tidewater Renewables, citing market harm. The CITT will issue a preliminary ruling by May 5, 2025, while the CBSA will determine by June 4, 2025, whether unfair pricing and subsidies are impacting Canadian producers.
author: Analysts Account
